__description: Failed-ingest drilldown. Row 1: summary + breakdowns. Row 2: failure time series + top engines. Row 3: recent sample rows (click a row to copy doc_id/source for repro). Time range controls at top-right filter every panel. Default: last 24h. Uses the provisioned Vectoria-DB postgres datasource (see provisioning/datasources/postgres.yaml).
title: Vectoria — Bad Cases

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM documents WHERE status='failed' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN status='completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float / COUNT(*) END AS value FROM documents WHERE status IN ('completed','failed') AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COALESCE(error_type, 'unclassified') AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM documents WHERE status='failed' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY error_type ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT NULLIF(parse_engine, '') AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM documents WHERE status='failed' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY parse_engine ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '1h') AS time, COALESCE(error_type, 'unclassified') AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM documents WHERE status='failed' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Top 出问题的来源域名（仅 URL 样本）

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUBSTRING(source FROM '^(?:https?://)?([^/]+)') AS domain, COUNT(*) AS failures FROM documents WHERE status='failed' AND source LIKE 'http%' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY failures DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: 失败样本列表（点任意行复制字段用于复现）

targets.rawSql: SELECT created_at AS time, parse_engine AS engine, COALESCE(error_type,'?') AS error_type, CASE WHEN source LIKE 'http%' THEN LEFT(source, 80) ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(title,''), source) END AS source, LEFT(error_msg, 120) AS error_msg, id AS doc_id, kb_id FROM documents WHERE status='failed' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 200
